name: aligned_identity_broken
reason: If an address is already aligned, align_to_usize should return it unchanged; inconsistency between aligned and align_to_usize would be a spec bug.

name: align_not_idempotent

name: align_one_not_identity
reason: Every integer is 1-aligned, so aligning to 1 must always return the input unchanged.
